  "batch_log_partial_apply_command": "python3 scripts/log_manual_distribution.py --from-csv data/manual_distribution_url_template.csv --allow-partial --apply --refresh-admin",

  "public_url_reconciliation_apply_command": "",

  "next_action": "Post each card in YouTube Community, copy the real public URL, then log it.",
  "next_post_now": {
    "id": "FP-AUTO-261",
    "release": "I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds",
    "platform": "YouTube Community",
    "surface_url": "https://www.youtube.com/@lilyroo.artist/community",
    "copy_source": "data/manual-posting-cards/fp-auto-261.txt",
    "asset_source": "assets/albums/i-learned-it-all-in-fifteen-seconds/art/01-i-learned-it-all-in-fifteen-seconds.jpg",
    "asset_url": "https://www.lilyroo.com/assets/albums/i-learned-it-all-in-fifteen-seconds/art/01-i-learned-it-all-in-fifteen-seconds.jpg",
    "paste_text": "New transmission: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is live. Remastered cover art, same suspicious amount of feeling.\n\nStream: https://open.spotify.com/album/5TBsbgE68DTPlAFsPsLEhi | Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/i-learned-it-all-in-fifteen-seconds-single/6768918249 | YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@lilyroo.artist | YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=vK0mDIW65o4",
    "log_preview_command": "python3 scripts/log_manual_distribution.py --id FP-AUTO-261 --url PUBLIC_URL",
    "log_apply_command": "python3 scripts/log_manual_distribution.py --id FP-AUTO-261 --url PUBLIC_URL --apply --refresh-admin",
    "result_handoff_report": "admin/reports/experiment-result-clipboard.md",

      "The YouTube Community post is published from the listed text and asset.",
      "A real public YouTube Community URL replaces PUBLIC_URL in the logging command.",

}
